german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: Half of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core and Customer-Facing PMs Dominate Equally
pm_type.subtitle: A balanced pattern indicates no significant preference for one PM type over the other.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Workforce
seniority.subtitle: Over half of positions are held by senior professionals, indicating a strong senior-heavy market.

work_mode.title: Work Modes Reflect Diverse Preferences Among Employees
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of the workforce favors hybrid and onsite arrangements over fully remote options.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: Half of roles prioritize AI responsibilities, with 45% requiring AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Distributed Yet Unclassified
industry.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remains unclassified, indicating potential accessibility constraints.
